_comment: open-brain registers each agent runtime as a node. Every node MUST expose GET /api/status returning at minimum {version, providers, cron_job_count, telegram (or any 'health' boolean), tools_enabled}. Optional endpoints: /api/cron, /api/cron/runs, /api/sessions, /api/tools, POST /api/ask, POST /api/cron/run. Larry is the reference impl.

_future_examples_.name: Claude Code (long-running)
_future_examples_.comment: would expose /api/status with active session count and last completion timestamp

_future_examples_.name: Stripe Monitor
_future_examples_.comment: thin daemon that polls Stripe and exposes a status endpoint with subs/MRR/last_error
